# Documentation Templates

This folder contains reusable templates for keeping repository documentation consistent
from the beginning.

Use these templates when adding new architecture decisions, experiments, implementation
notes, or thesis working notes.

Jupyter notebook templates are stored under `../../notebooks/templates/`.

## Index

- [ADR Template](adr_template.md)
- [Experiment Template](experiment_template.md)
- [Implementation Note Template](implementation_note_template.md)
- [Thesis Note Template](thesis_note_template.md)
- [Experiment Notebook Template](../../notebooks/templates/experiment_notebook_template.ipynb)
